---
title: tools
description: "把文章中提到的对象视为一种工具，关注它能解决什么问题。"
page-layout: full
toc: false
body-class: category-page
listing:
  id: category-posts
  contents: [../posts/**/*.qmd, ../pages/**/*.qmd]
  include:
    categories: tools
  sort: date desc
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - categories
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

:::{#category-posts}
:::
